meaning: Cover interlock is open.
what_to_do: Close cover; inspect actuator/interlock switch.

meaning: Transfer roller/bias power supply abnormality.
what_to_do: Check transfer unit contacts, HVPS and harness.

meaning: Waste toner bottle is full or not detected.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat waste toner bottle and clean sensor area.

meaning: Paper feed motor or tray lift/feed mechanism error.
what_to_do: Inspect tray feed motor, lift motor, clutch and sensors.

meaning: Toner bottle is empty or not supplying toner.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat toner bottle; check toner supply motor if repeated.

meaning: Misfeed in indicated tray/duplex/fuser/exit area.
what_to_do: Open indicated section and remove paper scraps; check rollers and sensors.

meaning: Laser synchronization signal error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, polygon motor, harness, and controller board.

meaning: Laser diode or laser writing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check laser unit and laser control board; replace defective unit.

meaning: Main motor lock or drive abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect motor load, gears, motor harness and main motor.

meaning: Fuser thermistor open/out of position or very low temperature reading.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser thermistor/harness; replace fuser/thermistor if needed before reset.

meaning: Fuser failed to reach target temperature.
what_to_do: Check fuser lamp/heater, thermistor, thermostat, PSU and fuser connector.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormal/high or unstable.
what_to_do: Inspect thermistor contamination/position and fuser control; clear only after repair.

meaning: Fuser temperature control failure.
what_to_do: Check fuser assembly, thermistor, thermostat, heater and PSU.

meaning: Controller/engine service fault.
what_to_do: Record SC code; follow SC code service procedure; do not repeatedly reset fuser SC without inspection.

meaning: Exposure lamp/scanner home position or scanner drive error.
what_to_do: Check scanner lamp/CIS, home position sensor, scanner motor and harness.

meaning: Controller board did not start/communicate correctly.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; reseat memory/HDD/SD options; inspect controller board.

meaning: Cover interlock is open.
what_to_do: Close cover; inspect actuator/interlock switch.

meaning: Fusing unit failed to warm up.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser heater, thermistor, thermostat and power relay.

meaning: Waste toner bottle is full or not detected.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat waste toner bottle and clean sensor area.

meaning: Paper tray lift motor/sensor abnormality.
what_to_do: Check tray lift mechanism, motor and sensor.

meaning: Toner bottle is empty or not supplying toner.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat toner bottle; check toner supply motor if repeated.

meaning: Developer toner density abnormality.
what_to_do: Check toner supply, developer unit, ATDC sensor and perform proper adjustment.

meaning: Fusing unit overheated.
what_to_do: Inspect thermistor/thermostat and fusing control; reset after repair.

meaning: Misfeed in indicated tray/duplex/fuser/exit area.
what_to_do: Open indicated section and remove paper scraps; check rollers and sensors.

meaning: MFP controller/firmware board communication fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle, reseat boards/options, update firmware or replace board.

meaning: Cover interlock is open.
what_to_do: Close cover; inspect actuator/interlock switch.

meaning: Fusing unit failed to warm up.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser heater, thermistor, thermostat and power relay.

meaning: Waste toner bottle is full or not detected.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat waste toner bottle and clean sensor area.

meaning: Paper tray lift motor/sensor abnormality.
what_to_do: Check tray lift mechanism, motor and sensor.

meaning: Toner bottle is empty or not supplying toner.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat toner bottle; check toner supply motor if repeated.

meaning: Developer toner density abnormality.
what_to_do: Check toner supply, developer unit, ATDC sensor and perform proper adjustment.

meaning: Fusing unit overheated.
what_to_do: Inspect thermistor/thermostat and fusing control; reset after repair.

meaning: Misfeed in indicated tray/duplex/fuser/exit area.
what_to_do: Open indicated section and remove paper scraps; check rollers and sensors.

meaning: MFP controller/firmware board communication fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle, reseat boards/options, update firmware or replace board.

meaning: Front cover, back cover, or ADF cover is not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close all covers firmly; check cover actuator/sensor if message remains.

meaning: Paper eject or rear sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Clear paper path; inspect eject sensor actuator, rear cover, and fuser exit rollers.

meaning: Corona wire dirty or drum unit not seated correctly.
what_to_do: Slide corona-wire cleaner several times, return to home position, reinstall drum/toner.

meaning: High voltage/power supply or engine control fault.
what_to_do: Check HVPS contacts, drum/toner contacts, main PCB/HVPS connections.

lcd_error_message: Replace Drum / Drum End Soon / Drum Stop
meaning: Drum unit is near end or stopped.
what_to_do: Replace drum unit, then reset the drum counter according to model menu.

lcd_error_message: Jam Tray / Jam Inside / Jam Rear / Jam 2-sided
meaning: Paper jam in displayed section.
what_to_do: Remove paper tray/drum/duplex tray/back cover as indicated; remove all scraps; check rollers/sensors.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormality or fuser related service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; inspect fuser thermistor/heater and reset/replace fuser if needed.

meaning: Machine has a mechanical/service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; if repeated, record XX and follow service manual/service inspection.

meaning: Toner cartridge/drum assembly is not detected.
what_to_do: Remove drum+toner, reseat toner in drum, clean contacts, reinstall.

meaning: Paper not loaded or machine expects manual feed.
what_to_do: Load correct paper, adjust guides, verify driver paper source/size.

meaning: Paper feed/registration sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check feed rollers, registration sensor actuator, paper path, and sensor harness.

meaning: Paper feed motor/drive or paper path abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect gears, feed motor harness, motor load, and paper tray lift/feed assembly.

meaning: Driver/requested paper size differs from tray setting.
what_to_do: Match tray paper size, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: Main motor synchronization signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Check main motor harness/connector, gear load, main motor, and main PCB.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser unit lock signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Reconnect laser flat cable; inspect/replace laser unit or main PCB.

meaning: Laser polygon motor synchronized signal fault.
what_to_do: Check laser flat cable, laser unit, and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser warm-up/temperature control problem.
what_to_do: Check fuser thermistor, halogen/heater, fuser harness, LVPS/HVPS and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser unit/fusing temperature fault.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser unit, thermistor, heater lamp, LVPS, and fuser connector.

meaning: Paper/document feed or sensor related engine fault.
what_to_do: Inspect paper path sensors, actuator flags, harness, and feed assembly.

meaning: Duplex/2-sided unit or paper transport fault.
what_to_do: Check duplex tray, rear path, duplex sensor flags, rollers, and connectors.

meaning: Main PCB/firmware or engine control error.
what_to_do: Update firmware if applicable; inspect/replace main PCB after checking connections.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser scanner error or laser drive fault.
what_to_do: Check laser scanner unit, laser flat cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Laser beam detection/synchronization error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

lcd_error_message: Print Data Full / Out of Memory
meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.
what_to_do: Replace toner cartridge or check toner reset policy for your rental fleet.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Toner cartridge/drum assembly is not detected.
what_to_do: Remove drum+toner, reseat toner in drum, clean contacts, reinstall.

meaning: Paper not loaded or machine expects manual feed.
what_to_do: Load correct paper, adjust guides, verify driver paper source/size.

meaning: Paper feed/registration sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check feed rollers, registration sensor actuator, paper path, and sensor harness.

meaning: Paper feed motor/drive or paper path abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect gears, feed motor harness, motor load, and paper tray lift/feed assembly.

meaning: Driver/requested paper size differs from tray setting.
what_to_do: Match tray paper size, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: Main motor synchronization signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Check main motor harness/connector, gear load, main motor, and main PCB.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser unit lock signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Reconnect laser flat cable; inspect/replace laser unit or main PCB.

meaning: Laser polygon motor synchronized signal fault.
what_to_do: Check laser flat cable, laser unit, and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser warm-up/temperature control problem.
what_to_do: Check fuser thermistor, halogen/heater, fuser harness, LVPS/HVPS and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser unit/fusing temperature fault.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser unit, thermistor, heater lamp, LVPS, and fuser connector.

meaning: Paper/document feed or sensor related engine fault.
what_to_do: Inspect paper path sensors, actuator flags, harness, and feed assembly.

meaning: Duplex/2-sided unit or paper transport fault.
what_to_do: Check duplex tray, rear path, duplex sensor flags, rollers, and connectors.

meaning: Main PCB/firmware or engine control error.
what_to_do: Update firmware if applicable; inspect/replace main PCB after checking connections.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser scanner error or laser drive fault.
what_to_do: Check laser scanner unit, laser flat cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Laser beam detection/synchronization error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

lcd_error_message: Print Data Full / Out of Memory
meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.
what_to_do: Replace toner cartridge or check toner reset policy for your rental fleet.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Front cover, back cover, or ADF cover is not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close all covers firmly; check cover actuator/sensor if message remains.

meaning: Paper eject or rear sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Clear paper path; inspect eject sensor actuator, rear cover, and fuser exit rollers.

meaning: Corona wire dirty or drum unit not seated correctly.
what_to_do: Slide corona-wire cleaner several times, return to home position, reinstall drum/toner.

meaning: High voltage/power supply or engine control fault.
what_to_do: Check HVPS contacts, drum/toner contacts, main PCB/HVPS connections.

lcd_error_message: Replace Drum / Drum End Soon / Drum Stop
meaning: Drum unit is near end or stopped.
what_to_do: Replace drum unit, then reset the drum counter according to model menu.

lcd_error_message: Jam Tray / Jam Inside / Jam Rear / Jam 2-sided
meaning: Paper jam in displayed section.
what_to_do: Remove paper tray/drum/duplex tray/back cover as indicated; remove all scraps; check rollers/sensors.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormality or fuser related service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; inspect fuser thermistor/heater and reset/replace fuser if needed.

meaning: Machine has a mechanical/service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; if repeated, record XX and follow service manual/service inspection.

meaning: Toner cartridge/drum assembly is not detected.
what_to_do: Remove drum+toner, reseat toner in drum, clean contacts, reinstall.

meaning: Paper not loaded or machine expects manual feed.
what_to_do: Load correct paper, adjust guides, verify driver paper source/size.

meaning: Paper feed/registration sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check feed rollers, registration sensor actuator, paper path, and sensor harness.

meaning: Paper feed motor/drive or paper path abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect gears, feed motor harness, motor load, and paper tray lift/feed assembly.

meaning: Driver/requested paper size differs from tray setting.
what_to_do: Match tray paper size, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: Main motor synchronization signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Check main motor harness/connector, gear load, main motor, and main PCB.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser unit lock signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Reconnect laser flat cable; inspect/replace laser unit or main PCB.

meaning: Laser polygon motor synchronized signal fault.
what_to_do: Check laser flat cable, laser unit, and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser warm-up/temperature control problem.
what_to_do: Check fuser thermistor, halogen/heater, fuser harness, LVPS/HVPS and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser unit/fusing temperature fault.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser unit, thermistor, heater lamp, LVPS, and fuser connector.

meaning: Paper/document feed or sensor related engine fault.
what_to_do: Inspect paper path sensors, actuator flags, harness, and feed assembly.

meaning: Duplex/2-sided unit or paper transport fault.
what_to_do: Check duplex tray, rear path, duplex sensor flags, rollers, and connectors.

meaning: Main PCB/firmware or engine control error.
what_to_do: Update firmware if applicable; inspect/replace main PCB after checking connections.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser scanner error or laser drive fault.
what_to_do: Check laser scanner unit, laser flat cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Laser beam detection/synchronization error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

lcd_error_message: Print Data Full / Out of Memory
meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.
what_to_do: Replace toner cartridge or check toner reset policy for your rental fleet.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Scanner cover, ink cover, or jam clear cover is open.
what_to_do: Close cover fully; check cover switch if message remains.

meaning: Paper did not feed or is jammed.
what_to_do: Remove paper/jam scraps; fan paper; clean pickup rollers; check rear jam cover.

meaning: Paper jam or carriage/paper feed abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Remove scraps; inspect paper feed rollers, PE sensor and carriage movement.

meaning: Firmware/main PCB initialization abnormality.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; update firmware; check main PCB if repeated.

meaning: Temperature or head/board abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Allow cooling; check print head cable, main PCB, and power supply.

meaning: Carriage or paper feed mechanism unable to move correctly.
what_to_do: Check for obstruction, carriage belt, motor, encoder strip and purge lock.

lcd_error_message: Wrong Paper Size / Paper Size Mismatch
meaning: Loaded/requested paper size differs from settings.
what_to_do: Match tray setting, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: One or more color inks are empty; machine may allow temporary B&W only.
what_to_do: Replace indicated ink with correct cartridge/bottle; run test print.

lcd_error_message: Cannot Detect / Cannot Detect Ink Volume
meaning: Ink cartridge/bottle chip or sensor not detected.
what_to_do: Reinstall ink, clean contacts if cartridge model, verify correct genuine/compatible ink.

meaning: Ink is low or empty.
what_to_do: Refill/replace the indicated color; never run tank models dry.

meaning: Purge/maintenance unit cannot complete cleaning.
what_to_do: Remove paper scraps near platen; check purge unit, cap, wiper, carriage path, and absorber counter if applicable.

meaning: Ink absorber box/pad is full or nearly full.
what_to_do: Replace absorber box/pads and reset purge/absorber counter only after service.

meaning: Print head cable/connection or head drive abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head FFC/cable and carriage PCB; replace print head if needed.

meaning: Print head drive voltage/temperature abnormality; often print head failure.
what_to_do: Check head cable and main PCB; replace print head if confirmed.

meaning: Purge cam switch / maintenance unit position error.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, cam switch, gears, foreign objects, and harness.

meaning: Carriage movement or CR encoder abnormality.
what_to_do: Clean encoder strip; check carriage rail, timing belt, carriage motor and sensor.

meaning: Print head drive or temperature detection abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head, head cable, carriage PCB and main PCB.

meaning: Waste ink absorber near/full or purge count service condition.
what_to_do: Replace absorber parts and reset counter after service.

meaning: Maintenance unit / purge position abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, wiper/cap movement, gears and cam switch.

meaning: Print engine has a service fault.
what_to_do: Record XX; inspect service area according to service manual before resetting.

meaning: Initialization failed after power-on.
what_to_do: Check carriage lock, encoder strip, paper scraps, purge unit and scanner path.

meaning: Scanner/ADF service fault.
what_to_do: Inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF sensors, and scanner home position.

what_to_do: Close cover fully; check cover switch if message remains.

what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

lcd_error_message: Print Data Full / Out of Memory
meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.
what_to_do: Replace toner cartridge or check toner reset policy for your rental fleet.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Front cover, back cover, or ADF cover is not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close all covers firmly; check cover actuator/sensor if message remains.

meaning: Paper eject or rear sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Clear paper path; inspect eject sensor actuator, rear cover, and fuser exit rollers.

meaning: Corona wire dirty or drum unit not seated correctly.
what_to_do: Slide corona-wire cleaner several times, return to home position, reinstall drum/toner.

meaning: High voltage/power supply or engine control fault.
what_to_do: Check HVPS contacts, drum/toner contacts, main PCB/HVPS connections.

lcd_error_message: Replace Drum / Drum End Soon / Drum Stop
meaning: Drum unit is near end or stopped.
what_to_do: Replace drum unit, then reset the drum counter according to model menu.

lcd_error_message: Jam Tray / Jam Inside / Jam Rear / Jam 2-sided
meaning: Paper jam in displayed section.
what_to_do: Remove paper tray/drum/duplex tray/back cover as indicated; remove all scraps; check rollers/sensors.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormality or fuser related service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; inspect fuser thermistor/heater and reset/replace fuser if needed.

meaning: Machine has a mechanical/service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; if repeated, record XX and follow service manual/service inspection.

meaning: Toner cartridge/drum assembly is not detected.
what_to_do: Remove drum+toner, reseat toner in drum, clean contacts, reinstall.

meaning: Paper not loaded or machine expects manual feed.
what_to_do: Load correct paper, adjust guides, verify driver paper source/size.

meaning: Paper feed/registration sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check feed rollers, registration sensor actuator, paper path, and sensor harness.

meaning: Paper feed motor/drive or paper path abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect gears, feed motor harness, motor load, and paper tray lift/feed assembly.

meaning: Driver/requested paper size differs from tray setting.
what_to_do: Match tray paper size, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: Main motor synchronization signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Check main motor harness/connector, gear load, main motor, and main PCB.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser unit lock signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Reconnect laser flat cable; inspect/replace laser unit or main PCB.

meaning: Laser polygon motor synchronized signal fault.
what_to_do: Check laser flat cable, laser unit, and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser warm-up/temperature control problem.
what_to_do: Check fuser thermistor, halogen/heater, fuser harness, LVPS/HVPS and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser unit/fusing temperature fault.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser unit, thermistor, heater lamp, LVPS, and fuser connector.

meaning: Paper/document feed or sensor related engine fault.
what_to_do: Inspect paper path sensors, actuator flags, harness, and feed assembly.

meaning: Duplex/2-sided unit or paper transport fault.
what_to_do: Check duplex tray, rear path, duplex sensor flags, rollers, and connectors.

meaning: Main PCB/firmware or engine control error.
what_to_do: Update firmware if applicable; inspect/replace main PCB after checking connections.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser scanner error or laser drive fault.
what_to_do: Check laser scanner unit, laser flat cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Laser beam detection/synchronization error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Top/front/rear door not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close covers; inspect cover switch/actuator.

meaning: Main motor or drive motor startup/rotation fault.
what_to_do: Check motor connector, gears, toner/drum load and motor assembly.

meaning: Paper jam, delayed feed, or sensor path error.
what_to_do: Clear path and check pickup roller, separation pad, registration/exit sensors.

meaning: Paper jam or paper path sensor timing error.
what_to_do: Clear jam, check pickup/separation rollers, paper size, and path sensors.

meaning: Fuser failed to warm up or fuser temperature abnormality.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; check fuser, power source, LVPS, and fuser connectors.

meaning: Requested tray/paper size not available.
what_to_do: Load correct paper or change driver/app paper source and size.

meaning: Cooling fan failed or blocked.
what_to_do: Inspect fan, obstruction, connector, and DC controller.

meaning: Laser scanner beam detect or laser unit error.
what_to_do: Check laser/scanner assembly, cable, formatter/DC controller.

meaning: Laser scanner motor speed/rotation error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser scanner motor/cable; replace laser scanner if confirmed.

meaning: Firmware/formatter communication or corrupt print job error.
what_to_do: Power-cycle, clear print queue, update firmware, isolate formatter/network cause.

meaning: Engine communication/DC controller error.
what_to_do: Check formatter-to-engine connectors; service DC controller/formatter.

meaning: Firmware, formatter, accessory, or network-related service error.
what_to_do: Power-cycle, disconnect network/accessories, update firmware, replace formatter if needed.

meaning: Print job is too large or communication buffer overflowed.
what_to_do: Simplify job, lower resolution, use USB/direct driver, or add memory on models that support it.

meaning: Toner cartridge low, empty, or supply memory not read.
what_to_do: Replace cartridge; clean/reseat cartridge contacts if supply memory error appears.

meaning: Print job is too large or communication buffer overflowed.
what_to_do: Simplify job, lower resolution, use USB/direct driver, or add memory on models that support it.

meaning: Toner cartridge low, empty, or supply memory not read.
what_to_do: Replace cartridge; clean/reseat cartridge contacts if supply memory error appears.

meaning: Top/front/rear door not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close covers; inspect cover switch/actuator.

meaning: Main motor or drive motor startup/rotation fault.
what_to_do: Check motor connector, gears, toner/drum load and motor assembly.

meaning: Paper jam, delayed feed, or sensor path error.
what_to_do: Clear path and check pickup roller, separation pad, registration/exit sensors.

meaning: Paper jam or paper path sensor timing error.
what_to_do: Clear jam, check pickup/separation rollers, paper size, and path sensors.

meaning: Fuser failed to warm up or fuser temperature abnormality.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; check fuser, power source, LVPS, and fuser connectors.

meaning: Requested tray/paper size not available.
what_to_do: Load correct paper or change driver/app paper source and size.

meaning: Cooling fan failed or blocked.
what_to_do: Inspect fan, obstruction, connector, and DC controller.

meaning: Laser scanner beam detect or laser unit error.
what_to_do: Check laser/scanner assembly, cable, formatter/DC controller.

meaning: Laser scanner motor speed/rotation error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser scanner motor/cable; replace laser scanner if confirmed.

meaning: Firmware/formatter communication or corrupt print job error.
what_to_do: Power-cycle, clear print queue, update firmware, isolate formatter/network cause.

meaning: Engine communication/DC controller error.
what_to_do: Check formatter-to-engine connectors; service DC controller/formatter.

meaning: This database value is a label/placeholder, not a printer/copier model.
what_to_do: Clean the database value or map it to an actual model before using error-code lookup.

meaning: Scanner cover, ink cover, or jam clear cover is open.
what_to_do: Close cover fully; check cover switch if message remains.

meaning: Paper did not feed or is jammed.
what_to_do: Remove paper/jam scraps; fan paper; clean pickup rollers; check rear jam cover.

meaning: Paper jam or carriage/paper feed abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Remove scraps; inspect paper feed rollers, PE sensor and carriage movement.

meaning: Firmware/main PCB initialization abnormality.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; update firmware; check main PCB if repeated.

meaning: Temperature or head/board abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Allow cooling; check print head cable, main PCB, and power supply.

meaning: Carriage or paper feed mechanism unable to move correctly.
what_to_do: Check for obstruction, carriage belt, motor, encoder strip and purge lock.

lcd_error_message: Wrong Paper Size / Paper Size Mismatch
meaning: Loaded/requested paper size differs from settings.
what_to_do: Match tray setting, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: One or more color inks are empty; machine may allow temporary B&W only.
what_to_do: Replace indicated ink with correct cartridge/bottle; run test print.

lcd_error_message: Cannot Detect / Cannot Detect Ink Volume
meaning: Ink cartridge/bottle chip or sensor not detected.
what_to_do: Reinstall ink, clean contacts if cartridge model, verify correct genuine/compatible ink.

meaning: Ink is low or empty.
what_to_do: Refill/replace the indicated color; never run tank models dry.

meaning: Purge/maintenance unit cannot complete cleaning.
what_to_do: Remove paper scraps near platen; check purge unit, cap, wiper, carriage path, and absorber counter if applicable.

meaning: Ink absorber box/pad is full or nearly full.
what_to_do: Replace absorber box/pads and reset purge/absorber counter only after service.

meaning: Print head cable/connection or head drive abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head FFC/cable and carriage PCB; replace print head if needed.

meaning: Print head drive voltage/temperature abnormality; often print head failure.
what_to_do: Check head cable and main PCB; replace print head if confirmed.

meaning: Purge cam switch / maintenance unit position error.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, cam switch, gears, foreign objects, and harness.

meaning: Carriage movement or CR encoder abnormality.
what_to_do: Clean encoder strip; check carriage rail, timing belt, carriage motor and sensor.

meaning: Print head drive or temperature detection abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head, head cable, carriage PCB and main PCB.

meaning: Waste ink absorber near/full or purge count service condition.
what_to_do: Replace absorber parts and reset counter after service.

meaning: Maintenance unit / purge position abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, wiper/cap movement, gears and cam switch.

meaning: Print engine has a service fault.
what_to_do: Record XX; inspect service area according to service manual before resetting.

meaning: Initialization failed after power-on.
what_to_do: Check carriage lock, encoder strip, paper scraps, purge unit and scanner path.

meaning: Scanner/ADF service fault.
what_to_do: Inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF sensors, and scanner home position.

meaning: Paper feed jam or no paper.
what_to_do: Remove jam/load paper; clean feed rollers.

meaning: Print head temperature abnormality.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; check cartridges/print head; replace if repeated.

meaning: Carriage movement/encoder obstruction.
what_to_do: Remove obstruction; clean encoder strip; check carriage belt and motor.

meaning: Ink absorber counter has reached service limit.
what_to_do: Replace absorber pads and reset counter after service.

meaning: Print head or main board drive fault.
what_to_do: Check/replace print head; inspect main board if repeated.

meaning: Cover interlock is open.
what_to_do: Close cover; inspect actuator/interlock switch.

meaning: Fixing temperature rise is faulty.
what_to_do: Check heater, thermistor, power supply and DC controller.

meaning: Fixing temperature dropped below control range.
what_to_do: Check fixing unit, thermistor and power supply.

meaning: Waste toner bottle is full or not detected.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat waste toner bottle and clean sensor area.

meaning: Toner bottle is empty or not supplying toner.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat toner bottle; check toner supply motor if repeated.

meaning: Fixing assembly failed to warm up correctly.
what_to_do: Inspect fixing heater, thermistor, thermal switch and DC controller; clear error after repair.

meaning: Fixing assembly temperature abnormally high.
what_to_do: Inspect thermistor position/contamination and fixing control; clear in service mode only after repair.

meaning: Fixing film/drive rotation abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect fixing film, fixing motor/drive, sensor and replace fixing unit if needed.

meaning: Main motor rotation abnormality.
what_to_do: Check motor, gears, load and DC controller.

meaning: Waste toner container/full sensor condition.
what_to_do: Replace/empty waste toner container according to service procedure.

meaning: Misfeed in indicated tray/duplex/fuser/exit area.
what_to_do: Open indicated section and remove paper scraps; check rollers and sensors.

meaning: Scanner does not reach home position.
what_to_do: Check scanner lock, home sensor, scanner motor and cable.

meaning: Cover interlock is open.
what_to_do: Close cover; inspect actuator/interlock switch.

meaning: Fixing temperature rise is faulty.
what_to_do: Check heater, thermistor, power supply and DC controller.

meaning: Fixing temperature dropped below control range.
what_to_do: Check fixing unit, thermistor and power supply.

what_to_do: Replace/reseat waste toner bottle and clean sensor area.

meaning: Toner bottle is empty or not supplying toner.

meaning: Fixing assembly temperature abnormally high.
what_to_do: Inspect thermistor position/contamination and fixing control; clear in service mode only after repair.

meaning: Fixing film/drive rotation abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect fixing film, fixing motor/drive, sensor and replace fixing unit if needed.

meaning: Main motor rotation abnormality.
what_to_do: Check motor, gears, load and DC controller.

meaning: Waste toner container/full sensor condition.
what_to_do: Replace/empty waste toner container according to service procedure.

meaning: Misfeed in indicated tray/duplex/fuser/exit area.
what_to_do: Open indicated section and remove paper scraps; check rollers and sensors.

meaning: Scanner does not reach home position.
what_to_do: Check scanner lock, home sensor, scanner motor and cable.

meaning: Paper path jam/feed error.
what_to_do: Remove paper scraps; clean pickup rollers; check PE sensor.

meaning: Internal hardware, carriage, printhead or board error.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; check obstruction, encoder, printhead cable and main board.

meaning: Ink tank/cartridge/ink level issue.
what_to_do: Refill/replace ink and verify ink system is not run dry.

lcd_error_message: Service Required / Ink Pad End of Life
meaning: Waste ink pad counter reached service limit.
what_to_do: Replace/redirect waste ink pads/tank and reset counter after service.

meaning: Scanner/CIS home position or communication error.
what_to_do: Check scanner lock, CIS cable, home sensor and scanner motor.

what_to_do: Remove paper scraps; clean pickup rollers; check PE sensor.

what_to_do: Power-cycle; check obstruction, encoder, printhead cable and main board.

what_to_do: Refill/replace ink and verify ink system is not run dry.

lcd_error_message: Service Required / Ink Pad End of Life
meaning: Waste ink pad counter reached service limit.
what_to_do: Replace/redirect waste ink pads/tank and reset counter after service.

meaning: Scanner/CIS home position or communication error.
what_to_do: Check scanner lock, CIS cable, home sensor and scanner motor.

meaning: Front cover, back cover, or ADF cover is not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close all covers firmly; check cover actuator/sensor if message remains.

meaning: Paper eject or rear sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Clear paper path; inspect eject sensor actuator, rear cover, and fuser exit rollers.

meaning: Corona wire dirty or drum unit not seated correctly.
what_to_do: Slide corona-wire cleaner several times, return to home position, reinstall drum/toner.

meaning: High voltage/power supply or engine control fault.
what_to_do: Check HVPS contacts, drum/toner contacts, main PCB/HVPS connections.

lcd_error_message: Replace Drum / Drum End Soon / Drum Stop
meaning: Drum unit is near end or stopped.
what_to_do: Replace drum unit, then reset the drum counter according to model menu.

lcd_error_message: Jam Tray / Jam Inside / Jam Rear / Jam 2-sided
meaning: Paper jam in displayed section.
what_to_do: Remove paper tray/drum/duplex tray/back cover as indicated; remove all scraps; check rollers/sensors.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormality or fuser related service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; inspect fuser thermistor/heater and reset/replace fuser if needed.

meaning: Machine has a mechanical/service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; if repeated, record XX and follow service manual/service inspection.

meaning: Toner cartridge/drum assembly is not detected.
what_to_do: Remove drum+toner, reseat toner in drum, clean contacts, reinstall.

meaning: Paper not loaded or machine expects manual feed.
what_to_do: Load correct paper, adjust guides, verify driver paper source/size.

meaning: Paper feed/registration sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check feed rollers, registration sensor actuator, paper path, and sensor harness.

meaning: Paper feed motor/drive or paper path abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect gears, feed motor harness, motor load, and paper tray lift/feed assembly.

meaning: Driver/requested paper size differs from tray setting.
what_to_do: Match tray paper size, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: Main motor synchronization signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Check main motor harness/connector, gear load, main motor, and main PCB.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser unit lock signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Reconnect laser flat cable; inspect/replace laser unit or main PCB.

meaning: Laser polygon motor synchronized signal fault.
what_to_do: Check laser flat cable, laser unit, and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser warm-up/temperature control problem.
what_to_do: Check fuser thermistor, halogen/heater, fuser harness, LVPS/HVPS and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser unit/fusing temperature fault.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser unit, thermistor, heater lamp, LVPS, and fuser connector.

meaning: Paper/document feed or sensor related engine fault.
what_to_do: Inspect paper path sensors, actuator flags, harness, and feed assembly.

meaning: Duplex/2-sided unit or paper transport fault.
what_to_do: Check duplex tray, rear path, duplex sensor flags, rollers, and connectors.

meaning: Main PCB/firmware or engine control error.
what_to_do: Update firmware if applicable; inspect/replace main PCB after checking connections.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser scanner error or laser drive fault.
what_to_do: Check laser scanner unit, laser flat cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Laser beam detection/synchronization error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

lcd_error_message: Print Data Full / Out of Memory
meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.
what_to_do: Replace toner cartridge or check toner reset policy for your rental fleet.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Front cover, back cover, or ADF cover is not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close all covers firmly; check cover actuator/sensor if message remains.

meaning: Paper eject or rear sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Clear paper path; inspect eject sensor actuator, rear cover, and fuser exit rollers.

meaning: Corona wire dirty or drum unit not seated correctly.
what_to_do: Slide corona-wire cleaner several times, return to home position, reinstall drum/toner.

meaning: High voltage/power supply or engine control fault.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

lcd_error_message: Print Data Full / Out of Memory
meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.
what_to_do: Replace toner cartridge or check toner reset policy for your rental fleet.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Scanner cover, ink cover, or jam clear cover is open.
what_to_do: Close cover fully; check cover switch if message remains.

meaning: Paper did not feed or is jammed.
what_to_do: Remove paper/jam scraps; fan paper; clean pickup rollers; check rear jam cover.

meaning: Paper jam or carriage/paper feed abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Remove scraps; inspect paper feed rollers, PE sensor and carriage movement.

meaning: Firmware/main PCB initialization abnormality.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; update firmware; check main PCB if repeated.

meaning: Temperature or head/board abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Allow cooling; check print head cable, main PCB, and power supply.

meaning: Carriage or paper feed mechanism unable to move correctly.
what_to_do: Check for obstruction, carriage belt, motor, encoder strip and purge lock.

lcd_error_message: Wrong Paper Size / Paper Size Mismatch
meaning: Loaded/requested paper size differs from settings.
what_to_do: Match tray setting, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: One or more color inks are empty; machine may allow temporary B&W only.
what_to_do: Replace indicated ink with correct cartridge/bottle; run test print.

lcd_error_message: Cannot Detect / Cannot Detect Ink Volume
meaning: Ink cartridge/bottle chip or sensor not detected.
what_to_do: Reinstall ink, clean contacts if cartridge model, verify correct genuine/compatible ink.

meaning: Ink is low or empty.
what_to_do: Refill/replace the indicated color; never run tank models dry.

meaning: Purge/maintenance unit cannot complete cleaning.
what_to_do: Remove paper scraps near platen; check purge unit, cap, wiper, carriage path, and absorber counter if applicable.

meaning: Ink absorber box/pad is full or nearly full.
what_to_do: Replace absorber box/pads and reset purge/absorber counter only after service.

meaning: Print head cable/connection or head drive abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head FFC/cable and carriage PCB; replace print head if needed.

meaning: Print head drive voltage/temperature abnormality; often print head failure.
what_to_do: Check head cable and main PCB; replace print head if confirmed.

meaning: Purge cam switch / maintenance unit position error.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, cam switch, gears, foreign objects, and harness.

meaning: Carriage movement or CR encoder abnormality.
what_to_do: Clean encoder strip; check carriage rail, timing belt, carriage motor and sensor.

meaning: Print head drive or temperature detection abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head, head cable, carriage PCB and main PCB.

meaning: Waste ink absorber near/full or purge count service condition.
what_to_do: Replace absorber parts and reset counter after service.

meaning: Maintenance unit / purge position abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, wiper/cap movement, gears and cam switch.

meaning: Print engine has a service fault.
what_to_do: Record XX; inspect service area according to service manual before resetting.

meaning: Initialization failed after power-on.
what_to_do: Check carriage lock, encoder strip, paper scraps, purge unit and scanner path.

what_to_do: Close all covers firmly; check cover actuator/sensor if message remains.

meaning: Paper eject or rear sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Clear paper path; inspect eject sensor actuator, rear cover, and fuser exit rollers.

meaning: Corona wire dirty or drum unit not seated correctly.
what_to_do: Slide corona-wire cleaner several times, return to home position, reinstall drum/toner.

meaning: High voltage/power supply or engine control fault.
what_to_do: Check HVPS contacts, drum/toner contacts, main PCB/HVPS connections.

lcd_error_message: Replace Drum / Drum End Soon / Drum Stop
meaning: Drum unit is near end or stopped.
what_to_do: Replace drum unit, then reset the drum counter according to model menu.

lcd_error_message: Jam Tray / Jam Inside / Jam Rear / Jam 2-sided
meaning: Paper jam in displayed section.
what_to_do: Remove paper tray/drum/duplex tray/back cover as indicated; remove all scraps; check rollers/sensors.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormality or fuser related service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; inspect fuser thermistor/heater and reset/replace fuser if needed.

meaning: Machine has a mechanical/service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; if repeated, record XX and follow service manual/service inspection.

meaning: Toner cartridge/drum assembly is not detected.
what_to_do: Remove drum+toner, reseat toner in drum, clean contacts, reinstall.

meaning: Paper not loaded or machine expects manual feed.
what_to_do: Load correct paper, adjust guides, verify driver paper source/size.

meaning: Paper feed/registration sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check feed rollers, registration sensor actuator, paper path, and sensor harness.

meaning: Paper feed motor/drive or paper path abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect gears, feed motor harness, motor load, and paper tray lift/feed assembly.

meaning: Driver/requested paper size differs from tray setting.
what_to_do: Match tray paper size, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: Main motor synchronization signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Check main motor harness/connector, gear load, main motor, and main PCB.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser unit lock signal cannot be detected.
what_to_do: Reconnect laser flat cable; inspect/replace laser unit or main PCB.

meaning: Laser polygon motor synchronized signal fault.
what_to_do: Check laser flat cable, laser unit, and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser warm-up/temperature control problem.
what_to_do: Check fuser thermistor, halogen/heater, fuser harness, LVPS/HVPS and main PCB.

meaning: Fuser unit/fusing temperature fault.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser unit, thermistor, heater lamp, LVPS, and fuser connector.

meaning: Paper/document feed or sensor related engine fault.
what_to_do: Inspect paper path sensors, actuator flags, harness, and feed assembly.

meaning: Duplex/2-sided unit or paper transport fault.
what_to_do: Check duplex tray, rear path, duplex sensor flags, rollers, and connectors.

meaning: Main PCB/firmware or engine control error.
what_to_do: Update firmware if applicable; inspect/replace main PCB after checking connections.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser scanner error or laser drive fault.
what_to_do: Check laser scanner unit, laser flat cable, and main PCB.

what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

what_to_do: Check duplex tray, rear path, duplex sensor flags, rollers, and connectors.

meaning: Main PCB/firmware or engine control error.
what_to_do: Update firmware if applicable; inspect/replace main PCB after checking connections.

meaning: Polygon motor/laser scanner error or laser drive fault.
what_to_do: Check laser scanner unit, laser flat cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Laser beam detection/synchronization error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, scanner mirror contamination, laser cable, and main PCB.

meaning: Scanner/ADF/flatbed mechanical or sensor fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF path, then service if repeated.

lcd_error_message: Print Data Full / Out of Memory
meaning: Print job exceeds available memory.
what_to_do: Cancel job, reduce resolution, print fewer pages, or simplify PDF/image file.

meaning: Toner cartridge reached end of life.
what_to_do: Replace toner cartridge or check toner reset policy for your rental fleet.

meaning: Toner cartridge is near end of life.
what_to_do: Prepare correct toner; continue printing until Replace Toner appears.

meaning: Front cover, back cover, or ADF cover is not fully closed.
what_to_do: Close all covers firmly; check cover actuator/sensor if message remains.

meaning: Paper eject or rear sensor timing abnormality.
what_to_do: Clear paper path; inspect eject sensor actuator, rear cover, and fuser exit rollers.

meaning: Corona wire dirty or drum unit not seated correctly.
what_to_do: Slide corona-wire cleaner several times, return to home position, reinstall drum/toner.

meaning: High voltage/power supply or engine control fault.
what_to_do: Check HVPS contacts, drum/toner contacts, main PCB/HVPS connections.

lcd_error_message: Replace Drum / Drum End Soon / Drum Stop
meaning: Drum unit is near end or stopped.
what_to_do: Replace drum unit, then reset the drum counter according to model menu.

lcd_error_message: Jam Tray / Jam Inside / Jam Rear / Jam 2-sided
meaning: Paper jam in displayed section.
what_to_do: Remove paper tray/drum/duplex tray/back cover as indicated; remove all scraps; check rollers/sensors.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormality or fuser related service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle after cooling; inspect fuser thermistor/heater and reset/replace fuser if needed.

meaning: Machine has a mechanical/service fault.
what_to_do: Power-cycle once; if repeated, record XX and follow service manual/service inspection.

what_to_do: Close cover fully; check cover switch if message remains.

meaning: Paper did not feed or is jammed.
what_to_do: Remove paper/jam scraps; fan paper; clean pickup rollers; check rear jam cover.

meaning: Paper jam or carriage/paper feed abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Remove scraps; inspect paper feed rollers, PE sensor and carriage movement.

meaning: Firmware/main PCB initialization abnormality.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; update firmware; check main PCB if repeated.

meaning: Temperature or head/board abnormality detected.
what_to_do: Allow cooling; check print head cable, main PCB, and power supply.

meaning: Carriage or paper feed mechanism unable to move correctly.
what_to_do: Check for obstruction, carriage belt, motor, encoder strip and purge lock.

lcd_error_message: Wrong Paper Size / Paper Size Mismatch
meaning: Loaded/requested paper size differs from settings.
what_to_do: Match tray setting, driver setting, and application page size.

meaning: One or more color inks are empty; machine may allow temporary B&W only.
what_to_do: Replace indicated ink with correct cartridge/bottle; run test print.

lcd_error_message: Cannot Detect / Cannot Detect Ink Volume
meaning: Ink cartridge/bottle chip or sensor not detected.
what_to_do: Reinstall ink, clean contacts if cartridge model, verify correct genuine/compatible ink.

meaning: Ink is low or empty.
what_to_do: Refill/replace the indicated color; never run tank models dry.

meaning: Purge/maintenance unit cannot complete cleaning.
what_to_do: Remove paper scraps near platen; check purge unit, cap, wiper, carriage path, and absorber counter if applicable.

meaning: Ink absorber box/pad is full or nearly full.
what_to_do: Replace absorber box/pads and reset purge/absorber counter only after service.

meaning: Print head cable/connection or head drive abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head FFC/cable and carriage PCB; replace print head if needed.

meaning: Print head drive voltage/temperature abnormality; often print head failure.
what_to_do: Check head cable and main PCB; replace print head if confirmed.

meaning: Purge cam switch / maintenance unit position error.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, cam switch, gears, foreign objects, and harness.

meaning: Carriage movement or CR encoder abnormality.
what_to_do: Clean encoder strip; check carriage rail, timing belt, carriage motor and sensor.

meaning: Print head drive or temperature detection abnormality.
what_to_do: Check print head, head cable, carriage PCB and main PCB.

meaning: Waste ink absorber near/full or purge count service condition.
what_to_do: Replace absorber parts and reset counter after service.

meaning: Maintenance unit / purge position abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect purge unit, wiper/cap movement, gears and cam switch.

meaning: Print engine has a service fault.
what_to_do: Record XX; inspect service area according to service manual before resetting.

meaning: Initialization failed after power-on.
what_to_do: Check carriage lock, encoder strip, paper scraps, purge unit and scanner path.

meaning: Scanner/ADF service fault.
what_to_do: Inspect scanner lock, CIS cable, ADF sensors, and scanner home position.

what_to_do: Inspect tray feed motor, lift motor, clutch and sensors.

what_to_do: Replace/reseat toner bottle; check toner supply motor if repeated.

what_to_do: Open indicated section and remove paper scraps; check rollers and sensors.

what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, polygon motor, harness, and controller board.

meaning: Laser diode or laser writing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check laser unit and laser control board; replace defective unit.

what_to_do: Inspect motor load, gears, motor harness and main motor.

meaning: Fuser thermistor open/out of position or very low temperature reading.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser thermistor/harness; replace fuser/thermistor if needed before reset.

meaning: Fuser failed to reach target temperature.
what_to_do: Check fuser lamp/heater, thermistor, thermostat, PSU and fuser connector.

what_to_do: Inspect thermistor contamination/position and fuser control; clear only after repair.

what_to_do: Check fuser assembly, thermistor, thermostat, heater and PSU.

what_to_do: Record SC code; follow SC code service procedure; do not repeatedly reset fuser SC without inspection.

meaning: Exposure lamp/scanner home position or scanner drive error.
what_to_do: Check scanner lamp/CIS, home position sensor, scanner motor and harness.

meaning: Controller board did not start/communicate correctly.
what_to_do: Power-cycle; reseat memory/HDD/SD options; inspect controller board.

meaning: Cover interlock is open.
what_to_do: Close cover; inspect actuator/interlock switch.

meaning: Transfer roller/bias power supply abnormality.
what_to_do: Check transfer unit contacts, HVPS and harness.

meaning: Waste toner bottle is full or not detected.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat waste toner bottle and clean sensor area.

meaning: Paper feed motor or tray lift/feed mechanism error.
what_to_do: Inspect tray feed motor, lift motor, clutch and sensors.

meaning: Toner bottle is empty or not supplying toner.
what_to_do: Replace/reseat toner bottle; check toner supply motor if repeated.

meaning: Misfeed in indicated tray/duplex/fuser/exit area.
what_to_do: Open indicated section and remove paper scraps; check rollers and sensors.

meaning: Laser synchronization signal error.
what_to_do: Inspect laser unit, polygon motor, harness, and controller board.

meaning: Laser diode or laser writing abnormality.
what_to_do: Check laser unit and laser control board; replace defective unit.

meaning: Main motor lock or drive abnormality.
what_to_do: Inspect motor load, gears, motor harness and main motor.

meaning: Fuser thermistor open/out of position or very low temperature reading.
what_to_do: Inspect fuser thermistor/harness; replace fuser/thermistor if needed before reset.

meaning: Fuser failed to reach target temperature.
what_to_do: Check fuser lamp/heater, thermistor, thermostat, PSU and fuser connector.

meaning: Fuser temperature abnormal/high or unstable.
what_to_do: Inspect thermistor contamination/position and fuser control; clear only after repair.

meaning: Fuser temperature control failure.
what_to_do: Check fuser assembly, thermistor, thermostat, heater and PSU.
